name: oss-app-personalizer
description: Approval-gated desktop app for cloning, running, and personalizing open-source GitHub apps locally.

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "npm run renderer:dev" "wait-on tcp:5174 dist/main/main.js && APP_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 electron ."
